description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, elongated footprint and a low, horizontal profile. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large window openings distributed along the facades, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is flat, contributing to a modern, minimalist aesthetic, and the structure is surrounded by a green lawn bordered by a low fence. The interior layout is visible from above, revealing multiple rooms with wooden flooring and open passageways. The building features several entry points and a clear separation between living and private spaces. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding yard.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious green lawn. The layout is open and elongated, with visible wooden floors and multiple rooms.
description_view_0: This view highlights the elongated side of the bungalow, showing the flat roof, white exterior, and extensive window placement along the main facade.
description_view_1: From this angle, the front entrance and a portion of the interior layout are visible, with the green lawn extending to the right and the fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the long, continuous wall with evenly spaced windows and the flat roofline, as well as the depth of the lawn area.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the rear and side of the bungalow, with a clear view of the backyard, additional windows, and the boundary fence.
